profile.toast: All set! We're excited to have you-let's get started.

profile.title: Profile Details
profile.text: Update and manage your personal info, contact details, and preferences in your profile.

details.title: Welcome {name}! Let's create your profile.
details.subtitle: Manage your personal information.
details.photoTooLarge: Image is larger than required (3MB max).
details.photoProcessFailed: Unable to process this image. Please try a different file.
details.emailDisabledHint: You can update your email after onboarding. Once complete, change it anytime in your Profile settings.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings, including promo alerts, discount notifications, and review preferences.
settings.promotionsDesc: Stay updated with savings, new arrivals, promotions, and more via email.
settings.reviewsDesc: Get email updates when your orders are completed and when your reviews are published.
settings.confirmationsDesc: Get email updates about your final proof, design changes, and payment confirmation.
settings.unitDesc: Choose your preferred/default unit of measurement.
settings.billingDesc: Use shipping address as your default billing address.
